languages.text: "Это искупление для одного, наследни{mf|к|ца} Себериана. После смерти наши тела превращаются в яды, лекарства, материалы. Этим человек все, что при жизни натворил, искупает. Если подробности интересуют, спросите капитан-интенданта, она заведует распределением, ей же прошлый ее звания рассказал как тела обихаживать".

"It's atonement for the one, heir of Seberian. After death, our bodies are turned into poisons, medicines, and materials. That's how a person atones for everything they did in life. If you're interested in the details, ask the captain-quartermaster. She's in charge of distribution. The previous holder of her rank taught her how to tend to the corpses."
languages.original_text: "Это искупление для одного, наследни{mf|к|ца} Себериана. После смерти наши тела превращаются в яды, лекарства, материалы. Этим человек все, что при жизни натворил, искупает. Если подробности интересуют, спросите капитан-интенданта, она заведует распределением, ей же прошлый ее звания рассказал как тела обихаживать".

traits.locale_text: "It's the redemption for one, heir of Seberian. After death, our bodies are turned into toxins, medicines, and materials. That's how a person atones for everything they did in life. If you're interested in the details, ask the captain-quartermaster. She's in charge of distribution; the previous holder of her rank taught her how to tend to the corpses."

"It's atonement for the one, heir of Seberian. After death, our bodies are turned into poisons, medicines, and materials. That's how a person atones for everything they did in life. If you're interested in the details, ask the captain-quartermaster. She's in charge of distribution. The previous holder of her rank taught her how to tend to the corpses."

"I have no idea how you customarily deal with the bodies of your dead comrades, but this is how we do it. Inside the leaf shrouds, our dead soldiers are transformed by the bodies' secretions and enzymes into something that will help their families survive. Food. Building materials. Poisons. Medicines. Freedom for the one, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship} — we sacrifice everything for this mythical Last One to finally get it."

"It's the redemption for one, heir of Seberian. After death, our bodies are turned into toxins, medicines, and materials. That's how a person atones for everything they did in life. If you're interested in the details, ask the captain-quartermaster. She's in charge of distribution; the previous holder of her rank taught her how to tend to the corpses."

If you're interested in the details, ask the captain-quartermaster. She's in charge of distribution. The previous holder of her rank taught her how to tend to the corpses."

If you're interested in the details, ask the captain-quartermaster. She's in charge of distribution. The previous holder of her rank taught her how to tend to the corpses."

languages.text: « L'expiation pour un seul, {mf|héritier|héritière} de Seberian. Quand nous mourons, nos cadavres sont transformés en poisons, en remèdes et en matériaux divers. C'est ainsi que nous rachetons les fautes commises de notre vivant. Si vous désirez en savoir davantage, demandez à la capitaine-quartier-maître. C'est elle qui s'en occupe. Son prédécesseur lui a appris à prendre soin des corps. »
languages.original_text: "It's atonement for the one, heir of Seberian. After death, our bodies are turned into poisons, medicines, and materials. That's how a person atones for everything they did in life. If you're interested in the details, ask the captain-quartermaster. She's in charge of distribution. The previous holder of her rank taught her how to tend to the corpses."

traits.locale_text: « L'expiation pour un seul, {mf|héritier|héritière} de Seberian. Quand nous mourons, nos cadavres sont transformés en poisons, en remèdes et en matériaux divers. C'est ainsi que nous rachetons les fautes commises de notre vivant. Si vous désirez en savoir davantage, demandez à la capitaine-quartier-maître. C'est elle qui s'en occupe. Son prédécesseur lui a appris à prendre soin des corps. »

languages.text: «Es la expiación para el último, {mf|heredero|heredera} de Seberian. Después de la muerte, nuestros cuerpos se convierten en venenos, medicinas y componentes materiales. Así es como el difunto expía todas las afrentas que cometiese en vida. Si le interesan los detalles, pregunte a la capitana intendente, ella se encarga de la distribución. Su predecesor le enseñó a procesar los cadáveres».
languages.original_text: "It's atonement for the one, heir of Seberian. After death, our bodies are turned into poisons, medicines, and materials. That's how a person atones for everything they did in life. If you're interested in the details, ask the captain-quartermaster. She's in charge of distribution. The previous holder of her rank taught her how to tend to the corpses."

traits.locale_text: «Es la expiación para el último, {mf|heredero|heredera} de Seberian. Después de la muerte, nuestros cuerpos se convierten en venenos, medicinas y componentes materiales. Así es como el difunto expía todas las afrentas que cometiese en vida. Si le interesan los detalles, pregunte a la capitana intendente, ella se encarga de la distribución. Su predecesor le enseñó a procesar los cadáveres».

languages.text: “这是一人之赎，塞贝里安的继承人。死后，我们的尸体会被制成毒药、药品和材料。这就是一个人对自己生前所作所为的赎罪。如果对具体细节感兴趣，可以去问军需官上尉。她负责分配这些物资。她的上一任教会了她如何处置尸体。”
languages.original_text: "It's atonement for the one, heir of Seberian. After death, our bodies are turned into poisons, medicines, and materials. That's how a person atones for everything they did in life. If you're interested in the details, ask the captain-quartermaster. She's in charge of distribution. The previous holder of her rank taught her how to tend to the corpses."

traits.locale_text: “这是一人之赎，塞贝里安的继承人。死后，我们的尸体会被制成毒药、药品和材料。这就是一个人对自己生前所作所为的赎罪。如果对具体细节感兴趣，可以去问军需官上尉。她负责分配这些物资。她的上一任教会了她如何处置尸体。”

languages.text: "Das ist Buße für den Einzelnen, {mf|Erbe|Erbin} von Seberian. Nach dem Tod werden unsere Körper zu Giften, Medikamenten und Materialien. So büßt ein Mensch für alles, was er im Leben getan hat. Falls Euch die Details interessieren, wendet Euch an die Captain-Quartiermeisterin. Sie ist für die Verteilung zuständig. Ihr Vorgänger hat sie gelehrt, wie man mit den Leichen verfährt."
languages.original_text: "It's atonement for the one, heir of Seberian. After death, our bodies are turned into poisons, medicines, and materials. That's how a person atones for everything they did in life. If you're interested in the details, ask the captain-quartermaster. She's in charge of distribution. The previous holder of her rank taught her how to tend to the corpses."

traits.locale_text: "Das ist Buße für den Einzelnen, {mf|Erbe|Erbin} von Seberian. Nach dem Tod werden unsere Körper zu Giften, Medikamenten und Materialien. So büßt ein Mensch für alles, was er im Leben getan hat. Falls Euch die Details interessieren, wendet Euch an die Captain-Quartiermeisterin. Sie ist für die Verteilung zuständig. Ihr Vorgänger hat sie gelehrt, wie man mit den Leichen verfährt."

languages.text: "Bu, sona kalana kefarettir Seberian'ın vârisi. Ölümden sonra bedenlerimiz zehirlere, ilaçlara ve malzemelere dönüştürülür. İnsan, hayatta yaptığı her şeyin bedelini böyle öder. Detayları merak ediyorsanız Levazımcı Yüzbaşı'ya sorun. Dağıtımdan o sorumlu. Mevkisinin eski sahibi, cesetlerle nasıl ilgilenileceğini öğretmişti."
languages.original_text: "It's atonement for the one, heir of Seberian. After death, our bodies are turned into poisons, medicines, and materials. That's how a person atones for everything they did in life. If you're interested in the details, ask the captain-quartermaster. She's in charge of distribution. The previous holder of her rank taught her how to tend to the corpses."

traits.locale_text: "Bu, sona kalana kefarettir Seberian'ın vârisi. Ölümden sonra bedenlerimiz zehirlere, ilaçlara ve malzemelere dönüştürülür. İnsan, hayatta yaptığı her şeyin bedelini böyle öder. Detayları merak ediyorsanız Levazımcı Yüzbaşı'ya sorun. Dağıtımdan o sorumlu. Mevkisinin eski sahibi, cesetlerle nasıl ilgilenileceğini öğretmişti."

languages.text: 「死んだ仲間の遺体をどう扱うのかは知りませんが、我々はこうします。葉で包まれた遺体は、体液や酵素によって、家族が生き残るために必要なものに変えられます。食料。建築資材。毒。薬。そして、最後の1人の自由。我々は、この神話上の最後の1人のために、すべてを犠牲にします」
languages.original_text: "I have no idea how you customarily deal with the bodies of your dead comrades, but this is how we do it. Inside the leaf shrouds, our dead soldiers are transformed by the bodies' secretions and enzymes into something that will help their families survive. Food. Building materials. Poisons. Medicines. Freedom for the one, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship} — we sacrifice everything for this mythical Last One to finally get it."
